# iosxe_zone_security (Resource)

This resource can manage the Zone Security configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_zone_security" "example" {
  name        = "INSIDE"
  description = "Internal trusted network"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `delete_mode` (String) Configure behavior when deleting/destroying the resource. Either delete the entire object (YANG container) being managed, or only delete the individual resource attributes configured explicitly and leave everything else as-is. Default value is `all`.
  - Choices: `all`, `attributes`
- `description` (String) Zone description
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `protection` (String) config sync cookie protection against sync flood
- `vpns` (Attributes List) config vpn and zone binding list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpns))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--vpns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpns`

Required:

- `id` (Number) VPN Number
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_zone_security.example "<name>"
```
